# 39 — Phase 07 Life, Media, Growth, and Battle

<task>
Act as `bjt-boss`. Prepare `company/PHASE_PLAN.md` for PHASE-07 Life, Media, Growth, and Battle. Do not implement until human approval.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `docs/spec/digests/life_in_japan_digest.md`, `docs/spec/digests/media_experience_digest.md`, `docs/spec/digests/growth_social_digest.md`, `docs/spec/compact/11_learning_effectiveness_experience.md`, `docs/spec/compact/12_life_in_japan_contexts.md`, `company/gates/media-quality-gate.md`, `company/gates/growth-ethics-gate.md`, and `company/gates/finance-gambling-ethics-gate.md`.
2. Create/update `company/PHASE_PLAN.md`:
   - Phase ID: `PHASE-07`
   - Phase Title: `Life, Media, Growth, and Battle`
   - `approval_status: pending`
3. Include tasks for:
   - Daily/Life in Japan context learning slice
   - media provenance/accessibility controls
   - privacy-safe postcards/share pages
   - referral/share analytics without fake stats
   - battle fairness/anti-cheat and learning remediation
4. Required agents:
   - owners: `bjt-learner-ui`, `bjt-backend`
   - reviewers: `bjt-life-in-japan`, `bjt-media-experience`, `bjt-growth-social`, `bjt-security`
5. Stop on finance/gambling advice, autoplay in study/exam, private share leaks, fake ranks/opponents, or pay-to-win mechanics.
</instructions>

<definition-of-done>
- Life contexts are learning-first with disclaimers/provenance.
- Media is accessible and licensed/provenanced.
- Sharing is opt-in and privacy-safe.
- Battle/social loops are fair and learning-focused.
</definition-of-done>
